results.title: Spring-Loaded Latches | McMaster-Carr
results.snippet: Choose from our selection of spring-loaded latches, including slide-bolt locks and latches, push-to-close latches, and more. Same and Next Day Delivery.

results.title: Spring Latches GN 724.1 | Ganter
results.snippet: Spring latches GN 724.1 have a plunger pin with square cross-section, a latching surface on one side and a chamfer on the other. When moving in the direction of the chamfered pin, the plunger pin passes over grooves and edges, as the chamfered pin moves the plunger pin into the guide.

results.title: Spring Loaded Latch by Essentra Access Solutions Datasheet | DigiKey
results.snippet: View Spring Loaded Latch by Essentra Access Solutions datasheet for technical specifications, dimensions and more at DigiKey.

results.title: Spring Loaded Latches - Guden - Page 1
results.snippet: The spring latch is made up of several components like clips, a single leaf, pins and springs which are all also available below. Each spring latch has a spring-loaded retactable pin with a bent end to easily open or close a door, lid, cover or gate with ease.

results.title: Spring Loaded Latches - Maxum Hardware
results.snippet: Spring-loaded latches can be used for a variety of applications, including on shipping containers, steel returnable packaging racks, trailers, agricultural equipment, and horse trailers and gates.

results.title: 30-670SS | Spring Loaded Toggle Latch | Medium Duty | Protex
results.snippet: The 30-670SS is a spring loaded over centre toggle fastener from the Protex medium duty toggle latch range manufactured from type 304 stainless steel.

results.title: Spring Tension Stainless Steel Latches - MISUMI
results.snippet: Spring tension stainless steel latches are mechanical devices designed to securely fasten doors, covers, or panels while allowing for quick access. Made from durable stainless steel, these latches resist corrosion and wear, making them suitable for various industrial applications.

results.title: Spring-loaded latches - stop in opening position - Pinet Industrie
results.snippet: The range of spring loaded latches - stop in opening position consists of spring loaded bolt with locking system in aluminium, strike, sprinng loaded bolt with locking system, push barrel bolt. They range from 25mm to 152mm in length. They have stainless steel springs.

results.title: Spring Hook Latches - Nielsen Hardware
results.snippet: Heavy duty spring hook latches will engage both strikes and integral cover flanges or lips, compensating for gasket "set" over time or varied mating tolerances, providing a consistently tight seal over long term usage. Hook options include vinyl coating for special applications, as well as a variety

results.title: GN724.1 Spring Latches, Steel / Stainless Steel, with Chamfered Pin ...
results.snippet: GN724.1 Spring Latches, Steel / Stainless Steel, with Chamfered Pin, for Welding Spring latches GN 724.1 have a plunger pin with square cross-section, a latching surface on one side and a chamfer on the other.
